name: second-opinion
description: Get a second opinion from Google's Gemini Pro via the locally installed Gemini CLI (defaults to gemini-3.1-pro-preview; override with the CLAUDE_SECOND_OPINION_MODEL env var). Use this skill when in Plan Mode for large or critical tasks, when stuck on a debugging dead end, when facing architecture trade-offs, for subtle edge cases in code review, or any situation where an independent perspective would add value. Also use when the user explicitly asks for a "second opinion", "ask Gemini", "anothe
author: peterkrueck
summary_zh: 这是一个通过本地命令行调用 Gemini Pro 的工具。当你规划大型任务、陷入调试僵局、面临架构抉择或代码审查拿不准时，它能提供独立的 AI 视角帮你破局。
